@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step (call_pinCT9f3mscWagPOLoK7sEPZ), the agent computed each CPC group's EMA and selected groups whose own EMA peaked in 2022 without first identifying the per-year highest-EMA winners, thus missing the "highest ... each year" requirement and returning many non-winner groups.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s final computation (call_ZMMD9dgxp0MLPgxBl CONS oops id truncated) selects all CPC groups whose own EMA time series peak occurs in 2022 (checking “if 2022 in years_with_max”), rather than identifying the groups with the highest EMA within each year and then filtering to those whose best year is 2022, resulting in an overly broad, incorrect set.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (call_l0L03wBAKFhudVihrAqOue3M), the agent computed each CPC symbol’s year of maximum EMA and returned those whose personal best year equals 2022, rather than first identifying the per-year top EMA CPCs and then selecting the 2022 winners, leading to extra and missing codes compared to the ground truth.
